channel.title: Haitian Li on Tom M. Ragonneau
channel.description: Recent content in Haitian Li on Tom M. Ragonneau

item.title: Wednesday, 22 March 2023
item.description: Title: A Derivative-Free Direct-Search Methods for Nonlinear Optimization. Venue: TU817, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. Notes This talk continued to introduce the implementation of the method presented in the first part.

item.title: Wednesday, 8 March 2023
item.description: Title: A Derivative-Free Direct-Search Methods for Nonlinear Optimization. Venue: TU817, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. Notes This talk continued to introduce the implementation of the method presented in the first part.

item.title: Wednesday, 22 February 2023
item.description: Title: A Derivative-Free Direct-Search Methods for Nonlinear Optimization. Venue: TU817, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. Notes This talk continued to introduce the implementation of the method presented in the first part.

item.title: Wednesday, 8 February 2023
item.description: Title: A Derivative-Free Direct-Search Methods for Nonlinear Optimization. Venue: TU817, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. Notes This talk introduced the implementation of the method presented in the first part.

item.title: Wednesday, 18 January 2023
item.description: Title: A Derivative-Free Direct-Search Methods for Nonlinear Optimization. Venue: TU817, The Hong Kong Polytechnic University. Notes This talk introduced a new heterogeneous direct-search method for unconstrained optimization.

item.title: Tuesday, 10 January 2023
item.description: Title: The missing semester course. Venue: Online. Notes This talk introduced the missing semester course taught at MIT. The authors focused on shell tools and scripting, the vim editor, and version control using git.
